response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with over 15 years of diverse engineering experience, including high-scale microservices and recent work with AI-agent infrastructure. However, for a Principal-level (IC6) role specifically focused on Growth and Experimentation Systems, his resume lacks any demonstrated experience building experimentation frameworks, feature flagging systems, A/B testing infrastructure, or statistical telemetry. While his general software engineering fundamentals are strong, the absence of this critical domain expertise makes him a poor fit for leading enterprise-scale experimentation architecture.
strengths: Extensive software engineering tenure (15+ years) with proficiency in required languages like JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C, and C++.
Proven ability to build and scale high-performance systems, such as handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Demonstrated technical leadership, community contribution, and mentorship through founding open-source platforms and creating engineering workshops.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience architecting or working with experimentation platforms, feature flighting, or A/B testing frameworks.
No visible background in statistical methods, bias detection, or specialized telemetry infrastructure required for enterprise growth systems.
While experienced, his background leans heavily toward generalist full-stack and product development rather than leading unified, cross-team foundational engineering platforms at an IC6 level.
